markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate monday.com for GrowthX's services organization.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Primary Need:** A central platform to replace Notion for capacity planning and client health tracking, driven by unsustainable visibility gaps from managing 37+ client Slack channels.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** monday.com's Work Management product, specifically the Enterprise plan, to provide the required portfolio dashboards and dynamic workload management widgets.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** monday.com's AI features (sentiment analysis, custom health scores) directly address GrowthX's need for proactive client health monitoring, a capability also being evaluated in Vitally.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [**Cost & Timeline:** The Enterprise plan is \~$25k/yr for 40 users, with implementation as an additional, separate cost. A decision is targeted for year-end, with setup as the first project for a new Ops hire.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current State & Pain Points

  - [**Business:** High-touch services org (e.g., delivering 5 weekly blog articles per client) with flat monthly fees.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [**Current Tools:** Notion, Linear, and Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**Core Problems:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [**Capacity Planning:** Notion lacks the dynamic visibility needed to reassign clients and model workload changes.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [**Client Health:** No central system for tracking health, making it difficult to spot at-risk accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [**Scope Creep:** No visibility into "off-the-books" work, making it impossible to quantify its impact.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Communication:** Managing 37+ client Slack channels is unsustainable.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### monday.com's Proposed Solution

  - [**Product:** monday.com Work Management (not Sales CRM, as HubSpot is used for sales).](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**Core Functionality:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**Boards:** Track clients, projects, and tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**Dashboards:** Aggregate data for high-level KPIs and reports.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**Workload Widget:** A dynamic bubble chart to visualize team capacity, enabling managers to reassign tasks and instantly see the impact on individual workloads.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [**Integrations:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
      - [Native: HubSpot, Slack, Gmail, Outlook, Zoom.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
      - [Open API: Enables custom connections, e.g., to Linear or Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)

### AI & Client Health Scoring

  - [**Sentiment Analysis:** An AI column can analyze Slack messages pushed to monday.com to gauge client sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral).](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [**Custom Health Score:** A formula or AI column can compute a single client health score from multiple data points (e.g., meeting frequency, deliverable status, sentiment).](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [**Reporting:** The health score can be visualized on a dashboard to show account status (e.g., Healthy, At-Risk, On Track).](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)

### Pricing, Onboarding & Timeline

  - [**Pricing:** Enterprise plan is $52/user/month, billed annually.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
      - [**40 Users:** \~$25,000/year.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
      - [Volume discounts are available.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** Implementation is a separate cost, not included in the plan.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
      - [**Standard Partner:** \~$250/hour.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [**monday.com Internal Team:** \~$350/hour.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [**Alternative:** Daniel can connect GrowthX with a "platinum level" partner who offers free onboarding, paid by monday.com as part of the deal.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
      - [**Decision:** By year-end.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
      - [**Setup:** 4–6 weeks, to be led by a new Ops hire.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Daniel:** Send Andi sales sheets/one-pagers on monday.com Work Management and Enterprise features.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
      - [Share the meeting recording with George (Chief of Staff) for review.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
      - [Evaluate the total cost (plan + implementation) against competitors like Vitally.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
      - [Consider a follow-up call with George and a "platinum level" partner to discuss free onboarding options.](https://fathom.video/share/5chx5CgpNLkyZo3B39E61zxNKBVF5RgX?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
